title: A Joint Workshop on IGCC & Co-Production and CO2 Capture & Storage
summary: Report on a workshop jointly organized by the Energy Technology Innovation Policy research group of the Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs at Harvard University’s John F. Kennedy School of Government and Chinese Academy of Sciences.
body: Report on a workshop jointly organized by the Energy Technology Innovation Policy research group of the Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs at Harvard University’s John F. Kennedy School of Government and Chinese Academy of Sciences. Access the presentations given at the 2007 Joint Workshop on IGCC & Co-Production and CO2 Capture & Storage .
